## .Net Anti-Decompiler

.Net Anti-Decompiler is a protective tool for .Net assemblies. It provides an extra layer of security and compliance to .Net application from reverse engineering.

* * *

##### Technique Identifier

[U1422](https://unprotect.it/search/?keyword=U1422)

##### Evasion Categories

[![Packers icon](https://unprotect.it/media/2024/04/08/icons8-compress.svg)**Packers**](https://unprotect.it/techniques/?pre_select=packers)
